name: ISO 27001 Agent
description: Assesses whether a codebase or app is ready for ISO/IEC 27001:2022: detects technical security evidence (and risk anti-patterns), maps it to the Annex A controls, statuses each control, and produces an SoA-style gap report. Grounded in a bundled, dated reference pack (2022 edition + Amd 1:2024). Read-only; covers the technological subset of the ISMS; not a certification and not legal advice.
author: HybridAI

presentation.cardDescription: Reviews your codebase or app for ISO/IEC 27001:2022 readiness — finds technical security evidence and risk anti-patterns, maps them to the Annex A controls, and writes an SoA-style gap report. Read-only, grounded in the current standard, and clear that it covers the technical subset of the ISMS and is not a certification.
